specific_question: How many emails did Isabella send regarding upcoming KM system enhancements to clinical teams between January 1 and March 31, 2025?
answer: According to internal data a total of 12 emails were sent to clinical teams summarizing planned updates and maintenance schedules in Q1 2025.
